Log:
  sysutils/samesame: unbreak with clang 4.0

                                  if (pipeLeafs < 0)
                                      ~~~~~~~~~ ^ ~
  src/mainAction.cpp:197:21: error: ordered comparison between pointer and zero ('FILE *' (aka '__sFILE *') and 'int')
                                  if (outputLeafs < 0)
                                      ~~~~~~~~~~~ ^ ~
